name: Toy Story
description: Pixar's Toy Story franchise — the first feature-length computer-animated film and its sequels

questions.q: Who voices Woody in the Toy Story films?

source.notes: Hanks has voiced Woody in every Toy Story film.

questions.q: Who voices Buzz Lightyear?

source.notes: Chris Evans later voiced the in-universe human Buzz in the 2022 spin-off Lightyear.

questions.q: In what year was the original Toy Story released?

source.notes: First feature-length computer-animated film in history.

questions.q: What is Buzz Lightyear's iconic catchphrase?

source.notes: Used in every film in the franchise.

questions.q: Which animation studio produced Toy Story?

source.notes: Distributed by Walt Disney Pictures; Disney acquired Pixar in 2006.

questions.q: Who composed the Toy Story score and the song 'You've Got a Friend in Me'?

source.notes: Won an Oscar for Monsters, Inc.'s 'If I Didn't Have You' (2002).

questions.q: What is the name of Andy's next-door neighbor who tortures toys in the first Toy Story?

source.notes: Voiced by Erik von Detten.

questions.q: Who directed the original 1995 Toy Story?

source.notes: Won a special Academy Award for his work on the film.

questions.q: Which fictional pizza restaurant features in Toy Story, with a delivery truck cameo in every Pixar film since?

source.notes: The truck has appeared in virtually every Pixar feature as an Easter egg.

questions.q: Which cowgirl doll is introduced in Toy Story 2 as a long-lost former owner's prize?

source.notes: Pulls a string to shout 'Yodelaheehoo!'

questions.q: Who voices Jessie the cowgirl across Toy Story 2, 3, and 4?

source.notes: Nominated for Oscars for Working Girl and In & Out.

questions.q: What is the name of Jessie's horse, added to the group in Toy Story 2?

source.notes: The loyal, non-speaking palomino.

questions.q: In Toy Story 3, where do Woody, Buzz, and the gang end up mistakenly dropped off?

source.notes: Run by the tyrannical Lotso bear.

questions.q: Which strawberry-scented pink teddy bear is the villain of Toy Story 3?

source.notes: Voiced by Ned Beatty.

questions.q: Which spork-turned-makeshift-toy is the new character introduced in Toy Story 4?

source.notes: Voiced by Tony Hale; built by Bonnie at kindergarten orientation.

questions.q: Which Pixar short film directly inspired the original Toy Story?

source.notes: Won the 1988 Academy Award for Best Animated Short Film.

questions.q: What is Woody's catchphrase when his pull-string is activated?
choices: There's a snake in my boot!

source.original_a: There's a snake in my boot!
source.notes: He has several other strings such as 'Reach for the sky!' too.

questions.q: Who voices the cynical piggy bank Hamm, also famous as Cliff Clavin on Cheers?

source.notes: Ratzenberger has voiced a character in every Pixar feature.

questions.q: Which legendary comedian voices Mr. Potato Head in the original trilogy?

source.notes: Rickles died in 2017 before Toy Story 4; archival recordings were used.

questions.q: Which Toy Story 2 villain, a prospector doll, is voiced by Kelsey Grammer?

source.notes: The Prospector from the Roundup Gang.

questions.q: In what year was Toy Story 3 released, winning the Oscar for Best Animated Feature?

source.notes: Also nominated for Best Picture — the third animated film ever to do so.

questions.q: Which acclaimed genre screenwriter and future Avengers director contributed to Toy Story's script?

source.notes: One of four credited screenwriters on Toy Story.
